title: Witsenia pyramidalis
taxonomy: Witsenia pyramidalis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Iridaceae. It is native to southern Africa. The classification of Witsenia pyramidalis places it within the kingdom Plantae. Within the plant kingdom, Witsenia pyramidalis falls under the division Magnoliophyta. Further classification includes the class Liliopsida and the order Asparagales.
